name: list_events
description: List upcoming events from Google Calendar. Returns events from now (or a specified start time) in chronological order.

maxResults.description: Maximum number of events to return. Defaults to 10.

timeMin.description: Start of the time range in RFC3339 format with timezone offset, e.g. '2026-04-27T00:00:00+04:00'. Defaults to now.

timeMax.description: End of the time range in RFC3339 format with timezone offset, e.g. '2026-04-28T00:00:00+04:00'.
